Some days wonder wedding banquets Singapore, especially the traditional Chinese sit-down dinner for the married couple for the married couple’s parents.
You know what mean, room tables, tables are for the bride’s extended family, tables are for the groom’s extended family.
The remaining tables are either for friends the bride and groom put relatives that one really wants acknowledge.
Like that weird uncle who’s starting look more and more like his possessed Chihuahua.
matter what your guest arrangement, you’ll need find hotel that provides wedding package that fits your needs, including your budget.
Here summary how much wedding banquet will cost you this year.
Don’t expect most the wedding invitations you receive this year held luxury hotels.
While Singaporeans don’t seem have problem paying about $<hide> per table, prices per table have gone sharply the past few years that $<hide> now the low end.
you’re okay with picking hotel that’s little off the beaten track, then exchange convenience for comfort with Star hotel.
note that, generally speaking, these hotels have higher requirement for the minimum number tables you can request for.
Though there aren’t too many Star hotels that provide wedding packages, you’r

definitely going save holding your wedding one these hotels.
Other than resorting Star hotel, how you get yourself lower table rate?
There are many benefits having wedding banquet hotel, like enjoying complimentary stay their suites, and getting special rates for rooms for your family and helpers.
But with the rising prices hotel wedding banquets, these little extras just don’t seem worthwhile anymore.
Consider having your wedding banquet alternative location.
Country clubs like Orchid Country Club and Serangoon Gardens Country Club offer table rates least $<hide> and $<hide> respectively.
Orchid Country Club’s package even includes one night stay their Bridal Suite, there’s reason not choose over hotel.
Paying for wedding banquet small sum money, you might well get something out it.
Citibank credit cards and UOB credit cards usually have exclusive wedding promotions with certain hotels and restaurants.
Alternatively, you can just choose good air miles credit card charge your wedding banquet to, and use the miles you’ve earned pay for your honeymoon.
This one seems like obvious suggestion, since for several hotels, banquets Saturday have their prices marked least $<hide> per table.
That’s savings least $<hide> $<hide

alone not having Saturday.
But price really isn’t the only reason you should considering having your banquet another day.
Think how physically stressful traditional wedding day can be.
For many couples, the day begins ridiculously early with the bride getting made and into her gown.
The men aren’t entirely spared either, with the groom and his entourage going through the horrors gate crashing and bridal games (and the delays they often cause).
Then there’s the wedding ceremony itself, which can take two hours.
Depending how dramatic wedding banquet gets, the married couple may not even get eat!
Before the dinner over, the bride needs least have had couple outfit changes, and also gone from table table taking photographs.
the time the banquet ends late night, the happily married couple are often happy retire bed, and don’t mean for baby-making purposes.
holding your wedding banquet another day, like Sunday, you not only have more time celebrate, but you also give yourself and your partner enough breathing room enjoy your wedding weekend.
don’t care how popular you are Facebook.
There’s need invite your entire friend list and their cat your wedding.
your in-laws are being difficult and want book like, tables, for thei

long lost relations and old friends from their kampung days, then now you have the perfect excuse reject them the hotel ballroom just isn’t big enough.
The best part is, choosing smaller hotel ballroom might actually save you substantial amount money.
Smaller Star hotels offer table rate that’s almost half the price compared other Star hotels.
For example, for Saturday banquet, the Grand Mercure along East Coast Road about $<hide> per table, and Hotel Royal along Queen Street even less $<hide> per table!
banquet Amara for tables would cost least $<hide>.
banquet the Grand Mercure for tables would cost about $<hide>.
Just cutting people off from your guest list could save you over $<hide>.
That’s definitely lot money that you can add your honeymoon fund.
Plus, you don’t have invite that weird uncle with the Chihuahua from hell.
You can SingaporeBrides.com for the full list wedding table prices.
Also, note that these prices may not include service charge GST.
What other tips and tricks you have for couples planning their wedding banquets?
Share them with us.

The sun slowly sinks the sky, touching the spot where the water meets the sky spectacular blast colors.
Instagram filter needed here!
Bring the ohana family and experience these amazing sunsets for yourself from the private lanai Poipu Palms <hide>.
Inside, you’ll find new furnishings and new wood laminate flooring.
Open and airy, the fully-equipped kitchen has everything you’ll need for meal prep, including coffee and condiments.
Having the ocean right out the kitchen window while your cooking doesn’t hurt either!
Sit down for meals the <hide>-person dining table, with room for more the kitchen bar.
The oceanfront views continue the living room, where floor-to-ceiling patio doors let the outside in.
Crash the couch armchair, doing little channel surfing the flat-screen with cable.
Both bedrooms have fun tropical décor, queen beds and en-suite bathrooms, ideal for two couples traveling together.
You also get all the comforts home with amenities like Wi-Fi, washer and dryer, linens and beach towels and starter kit paper and cleaning supplies.
Sea Turtles, Dolphins and Whales…Oh My!
: Grab front-row seat the private lanai amazing show.
From your perch the top floor, you’ll see turtles and dolphins play the waves yea

lovely views out into cove (we watched lot sea turtles and even saw few spinner dolphins passing through).
There are effectively two suites, which gave plenty room spread out and would give two couples enough privacy.
The lanai and living room were wonderful places relax.
easy walk (<hide>.<hide> mi) the Grand Hyatt (several restaurants and beach) Brenneckes Bar (laid back) and beach-front park.
Everything was clean and the kitchen had everything needed for breakfast, lunches simple dinner.
The condo was quiet area noisy neighbors and (somehow!)
none the roosters Kauai infamous for.

stayed for least half hour, make sure were OK.
Thank goodness friend recovered and were able enjoy the rest our vacation.
